PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('        ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# the exact value 2')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('      ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# values 1 to 3 inclusive')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('      ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# values 3 to 1 inclusive')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionCallImpl(EXPRESSION_CALL)
    PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
      PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
          PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
          PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
        PsiElement(])(']')
    PsiElement(.)('.')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('each')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
      PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('   ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# iterate over 1,2,3')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Float')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('          ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# the exact value 2.0')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Float')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(FLOAT_LITERAL)('2.0')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('        ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# the exact value 2.0')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Float')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(FLOAT_LITERAL)('3.2')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('     ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# values 1.0 to 3.2 inclusive')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Float')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(FLOAT_LITERAL)('3.2')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(FLOAT_LITERAL)('1.5')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('    ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# values 3.2 to 1.5 inclusive')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Float')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionUnaryImpl(EXPRESSION_UNARY)
        PsiElement(-)('-')
        PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
          PsiElement(FLOAT_LITERAL)('1.0')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(FLOAT_LITERAL)('1.0')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('   ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# values -1.0 to 1.0 inclusive')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Pattern')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('red')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('blue')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('green')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Enum')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('blue')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('red')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('green')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('h')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Hash')
      PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Scalar')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('r')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Regexp')
      PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''(f)(o)(o)'')
        PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''x'')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=~)('=~')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Regexp')
      PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
          PsiElement(REGEX)('/x/')
        PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
    PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
      PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
      PsiElement(])(']')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=~)('=~')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Array')
      PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
        PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('          ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# => true')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
    PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
      PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('999')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('5')
      PsiElement(])(']')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=~)('=~')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Array')
      PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
          PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Integer')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement([)('[')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
              PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('10')
            PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# => false (one value > 10)')
